Label 'Stamps' with adjacent marking '1.5.-' (interpreted as £1 5s 0d). The zeros/pence dash are slightly stylized but consistent with previous '1.5.-' format on the page.

This 'Stamps' line shows '7.5' in the smaller place (no pounds figure) which aligns to the shillings and pence spacing; interpreted as £0 | 7s | 5d. This interpretation is supported by the subtotal to the right which sums correctly.
